description: Tren de Aragua arrest card in ICE's recurring template (square). A blue header bar reads 'TdA ARREST' in large gold serif caps. The background is a close-up photograph of a middle-aged man with heavy eyebrows, facial tattoos near his left eye, and a gray hooded jacket, looking at the camera. Overlaid at left in bold white sans-serif is the name 'Pedro Colmenares-Gonzalez.' A red banner across the lower center carries the charges in white caps: 'HOMICIDE & SEXUAL ASSAULT WITH A FIREARM.' A bottom blue footer bar shows the circular DHS seal and 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' (white) at left, with 'Tren de Aragua' in gold serif at right.
notable_text: TdA ARREST; Pedro Colmenares-Gonzalez; HOMICIDE & SEXUAL ASSAULT WITH A FIREARM; Tren de Aragua
